_comment: App Update Automation — Central Configuration for Medical Requisition Form

app.name: Medical Requisition Form
app.description: Offline Medical Requisition Form and Laboratory Request Tracker. Manage lab requisitions, patient details, specimen records, and clinical notes in one place.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Manage lab requisitions, patient records, and clinical notes offline.
features: Create and track Laboratory Requisition Forms for patients offline
Record specimen details, investigation requests, and clinical notes securely
Generate professional medical PDF reports and share requisition forms instantly

pages.settingsCurrencyDescription: Change the display currency for your records and reports.
pages.settingsResetDescription: Wipe all local form files, custom templates, and configuration settings completely.

mobile.name: Medical Requisition Form (Mobile)
mobile.description: Laboratory requisition form sheets optimized for mobile layouts.

tablet.name: Medical Requisition Form (Tablet)
tablet.description: Comprehensive laboratory requisition form sheets optimized for tablets.

desktop.name: Medical Requisition Form (Desktop)
desktop.description: Comprehensive laboratory requisition form sheets optimized for desktop.

pdf.shareSubject: Here is your Medical Requisition Form
pdf.shareText: Medical Requisition Form PDF generated successfully
pdf.csvShareText: Medical Requisition Form data exported as CSV

menu.emailSubject: Here is your Medical Requisition Form

ios.cameraUsageDescription: Medical Requisition Form needs access to your camera to capture patient records or specimen images.
ios.photoLibraryUsageDescription: Medical Requisition Form needs access to your photo library to attach patient records.
ios.microphoneUsageDescription: Medical Requisition Form needs microphone access when using the camera.
